chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 955 of 2021 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 22-02-2022 Mr. Sohail Ahmed Khoso, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Mehboob Ali Wassan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- It appears that earlier, the Petitioner had preferred C. P. No. D-665 of 2021, which was not pressed vide order dated 06-04-2021 in the following terms: “Learned counsel for the petitioner does not press this petition and submits that the petitioner will seek remedy before competent forum viz the Secretary School Education and Literacy Department, Government of Sindh in view of the judgments passed by the Service Tribunal and Honourable Supreme Court. In view of above instant petition is dismissed as not pressed alongwith pending applications, if any.” Thereafter, the Petitioner has purportedly approached the Secretary Education Department through his application dated ‘Nil’ through courier on 17-04-2021, which according to the Petitioner is yet to be decided. Notice was ordered and comments have been filed; however, we have not been assisted as to any decision by the Secretary Education Department on the application of the Petitioner as contended. Be that as it may, the Application available at Page-93 is now a matter of record, therefore, the Petition is disposed of with directions to the Secretary Education Department, Government of Sindh to attend the said application as available at Page-93 and decide the same in accordance with law. Let copy of this order be issued to the AAG’s office for compliance.

Be that as it may, the Application available at Page-93 is now a matter of record, therefore, the Petition is disposed of with directions to the Secretary Education Department, Government of Sindh to attend the said application as available at Page-93 and decide the same in accordance with law. Let copy of this order be issued to the AAG’s office for compliance. The Petition stands disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
